calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2015 Continued To Mar-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BALDWIN LAW GROUP, PATRICK BALDWIN, CHRISTOPHER MADER'S Motion For Change Of Venue is granted. Plaintiff and Defendants entered into a fee agreement which governed Defendants' legal representation of Plaintiff. Defendants' correctly note that where two sophisticated parties agree, pursuant to arm's length negotiations, to litigate an action in one of multiple statutorily permissible venues, they should be held to their agreement. (See Battaglia Enterprises Inc. v. Superior Court (2013) 215 Cal.App.4th 309.) Defendants' motion to change venue is granted pursuant to CCP section 396(a), because the parties agreed that any litigation arising out of disputes associated with the agreement would be litigated in the Superior Court of San Mateo County. San Mateo County is a proper venue because Defendant Baldwin Law Group's principal place of business is San Mateo County. Pursuant to CCP section 396b(b) Defendants are entitled to attorney's fees incurred in bringing the instant motion in the amount of $1,500. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
